code:
import io
import list
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn flush_token(_ acc: List<Int>, _ current: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(current)
    acc
  else
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(acc, v)
    when None
      acc
    end
  end
end

fn parse_tokens(_ text: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(text)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if is_ws(byte)
        result = flush_token(result, current)
        current = ""
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  flush_token(result, current)
end

fn sorted_insert(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut i = 0
    let n = xs.len()
    while i < n
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        if not inserted
          if v < x
            result = list.push(result, v)
            inserted = true
          end
        end
        result = list.push(result, x)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn dedupe_sort(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = sorted_insert(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn join_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let nums = parse_tokens(text)
let sorted = dedupe_sort(nums)
println(join_ints(sorted))
